data.description: Get chat inputs from the Playground.

context_id.info: The context ID of the chat. Adds an extra layer to the local memory.

files.info: Files to be sent with the message.

input_value.value: The growing demand for personalized, AI-driven mental health support tools that can provide real-time interventions and track long-term emotional well-being.

session_id.info: The session ID of the chat. If empty, the current session ID parameter will be used.
session_id.name: session_id

should_store_message.info: Store the message in the history.
should_store_message.name: should_store_message

data.description: Display a chat message in the Playground.

clean_data.info: Whether to clean data before converting to string.
clean_data.name: clean_data

context_id.info: The context ID of the chat. Adds an extra layer to the local memory.
context_id.name: context_id

data_template.info: Template to convert Data to Text. If left empty, it will be dynamically set to the Data's text key.

input_value.info: Message to be passed as output.

session_id.info: The session ID of the chat. If empty, the current session ID parameter will be used.

data.description: **Tavily Search** is a search engine optimized for LLMs and RAG,         aimed at efficient, quick, and persistent search results.

chunks_per_source.info: The number of content chunks to retrieve from each source (1-3). Only works with advanced search.
chunks_per_source.name: chunks_per_source

days.info: Number of days back from current date to include. Only available with news topic.
days.name: days

exclude_domains.info: Comma-separated list of domains to exclude from the search results.
exclude_domains.name: exclude_domains

include_answer.info: Include a short answer to original query.
include_answer.name: include_answer

include_domains.info: Comma-separated list of domains to include in the search results.
include_domains.name: include_domains

include_images.info: Include a list of query-related images in the response.
include_images.name: include_images

include_raw_content.info: Include the cleaned and parsed HTML content of each search result.
include_raw_content.name: include_raw_content

max_results.info: The maximum number of search results to return.
max_results.name: max_results

query.info: The search query you want to execute with Tavily.
query.name: query

time_range.info: The time range back from the current date to filter results.
time_range.name: time_range

tools_metadata.info: Modify tool names and descriptions to help agents understand when to use each tool.
tools_metadata.name: tools_metadata

query.description: The search query you want to execute with Tavily.
query.title: Query

value.description: **Tavily Search** is a search engine optimized for LLMs and RAG,         aimed at efficient, quick, and persistent search results.
value.display_description: **Tavily Search** is a search engine optimized for LLMs and RAG,         aimed at efficient, quick, and persistent search results.
value.name: fetch_content_dataframe

data.description: Uses AgentQL API to extract structured data from a given URL.

api_key.info: Your AgentQL API key from dev.agentql.com
api_key.name: api_key

is_screenshot_enabled.info: Take a screenshot before extracting data. Returned in 'metadata' as a Base64 string.
is_screenshot_enabled.name: is_screenshot_enabled

is_scroll_to_bottom_enabled.info: Scroll to bottom of the page before extracting data.
is_scroll_to_bottom_enabled.name: is_scroll_to_bottom_enabled

is_stealth_mode_enabled.info: Enable experimental anti-bot evasion strategies. May not work for all websites at all times.
is_stealth_mode_enabled.name: is_stealth_mode_enabled

mode.info: 'standard' uses deep data analysis, while 'fast' trades some depth of analysis for speed.
mode.name: mode

prompt.info: A Natural Language description of the data to extract from the page. Alternative to AgentQL query.
prompt.name: prompt

query.info: The AgentQL query to execute. Learn more at https://docs.agentql.com/agentql-query or use a prompt.
query.name: query

timeout.info: Seconds to wait for a request.
timeout.name: timeout

tools_metadata.info: Modify tool names and descriptions to help agents understand when to use each tool.
tools_metadata.name: tools_metadata

prompt.description: A Natural Language description of the data to extract from the page. Alternative to AgentQL query.
prompt.title: Prompt

query.description: The AgentQL query to execute. Learn more at https://docs.agentql.com/agentql-query or use a prompt.
query.title: Query

url.description: The URL of the public web page you want to extract data from.
url.title: Url

value.description: AgentQL. build_output - Extracts structured data from a web page using an AgentQL query or a Natural Language description.
value.display_description: AgentQL. build_output - Extracts structured data from a web page using an AgentQL query or a Natural Language description.
value.name: build_output

url.info: The URL of the public web page you want to extract data from.
url.name: url

wait_for.info: Seconds to wait for the page to load before extracting data.
wait_for.name: wait_for

data.description: Define the agent's instructions, then enter a task to complete using tools.

add_current_date_tool.info: If true, will add a tool to the agent that returns the current date.
add_current_date_tool.name: add_current_date_tool

agent_description.info: The description of the agent. This is only used when in Tool Mode. Defaults to 'A helpful assistant with access to the following tools:' and tools are added dynamically. This feature is deprecated and
agent_description.name: agent_description
agent_description.value: A helpful assistant with access to the following tools:

agent_llm.info: The provider of the language model that the agent will use to generate responses.
agent_llm.name: agent_llm

api_key.info: The OpenAI API Key to use for the OpenAI model.
api_key.name: api_key

format_instructions.info: Generic Template for structured output formatting. Valid only with Structured response.
format_instructions.name: format_instructions

handle_parsing_errors.info: Should the Agent fix errors when reading user input for better processing?
handle_parsing_errors.name: handle_parsing_errors

input_value.info: The input provided by the user for the agent to process.
input_value.name: input_value

max_iterations.info: The maximum number of attempts the agent can make to complete its task before it stops.
max_iterations.name: max_iterations

max_retries.info: The maximum number of retries to make when generating.
max_retries.name: max_retries

max_tokens.info: The maximum number of tokens to generate. Set to 0 for unlimited tokens.
max_tokens.name: max_tokens

model_kwargs.info: Additional keyword arguments to pass to the model.
model_kwargs.name: model_kwargs

model_name.info: To see the model names, first choose a provider. Then, enter your API key and click the refresh button next to the model name.
model_name.name: model_name

n_messages.info: Number of chat history messages to retrieve.
n_messages.name: n_messages

openai_api_base.info: The base URL of the OpenAI API. Defaults to https://api.openai.com/v1. You can change this to use other APIs like JinaChat, LocalAI and Prem.
openai_api_base.name: openai_api_base

output_schema.info: Schema Validation: Define the structure and data types for structured output. No validation if no output schema.
output_schema.name: output_schema

seed.info: The seed controls the reproducibility of the job.
seed.name: seed

system_prompt.info: System Prompt: Initial instructions and context provided to guide the agent's behavior.
system_prompt.name: system_prompt
system_prompt.value: You are a helpful assistant that can use tools to answer questions and perform tasks.

timeout.info: The timeout for requests to OpenAI completion API.
timeout.name: timeout

tools.info: These are the tools that the agent can use to help with tasks.
tools.name: tools

description: Searches and compares product prices across multiple e-commerce platforms.
name: Price Deal Finder
